entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano, I'm Luis Burd, an industrial engineer specializing in project management.

I identify as a person in the below category:

    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 

Since arriving in the US, my passion for project management has been a driving force in my career. I'm excited about joining the digital skills initiative to learn SAP, which plays a crucial role in modern project management. Mastering SAP will not only enhance my skills but also make me a more competitive professional. I'm eager to seize this opportunity to expand my knowledge and apply SAP tools effectively in real-world projects.

entry.title: Re: Export "Cutomer : Ctry-Spec.Enh." tab data of custome...
entry.content:
I am his colleague, and I received a valid response from PE, so I am sharing it here.
---
The only option I can think of is using Customer Data Returns app. Please check and explore this option for extract data from S/4HANA Cloud 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/74db242020e848ddb64014d54979b8e0.html?locale=en-US
---
I was able to download the desired table using this app.

entry.title: Re: BuildApps SAP AppGyver classic Data Entities for Firebase Failing (Help :) )
entry.content:
Hi,

I am too experiencing same issue. "Save Data Entity" is disabled for me in SAP Build Apps. Any help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Where to feed serial no. during PGI in ME2O
entry.content:
Hi,

Old OSS note 63409 says that adding serial number is not supported in ME2O. I could not find find other OSS note that is more recent with a solution for this.

Link: https://me.sap.com/notes/63409/E

In my company, we use t-code Adsubcon with Delivery creation and I am trying now to enable GI without delivery too for serialized materials.

Good luck!

entry.title: Can not deploy Fiori project to BTP ABAP environment .
entry.content:
Hi, SAP UI5 Expert, I create a fiori element project in BAS and everything are ok. The sap ui5 version is 1.120.12 . When I deploy it into BTP ABAP environment. Error shows as the following: ✔ Start deployment (Y/n)? … yes info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Creating archive with UI5 build result. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Archive created. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Starting to deploy. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 ZFREIGHTORDER2 found on target system: true info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 SAPUI5 application ZFREIGHTORDER2 was uploaded or registered with warnings info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 ***** Upload of SAPUI5 App or Library from ZIP-Archive into SAPUI5 ABAP Repository ***** info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Running in regular mode, brief log info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 15 Files found in Archive. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Parameters * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 A BAdI implementation for /UI5/BADI_REPOSITORY_LOAD is active: Operation parameters may have been adjusted. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The name of the SAPUI5 repository "ZFREIGHTORDER2" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The binary files are identified using the standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The text files are identified using the standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The files and folders to be ignored are determined from the built-in standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The description of the SAPUI5 repository has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Transport Request "H02K900024" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The external Code Page Name "UTF8" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The acceptance of Unix style end of line markers in text files has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Unix style end of line markers in text files get accepted. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The delta mode has been turned on. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Running in safe mode info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Updating existing SAPUI5 ABAP repository ZFREIGHTORDER2 info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Updating the Application Index * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Messages from its application log: info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Writing descriptor apps/freightordermgt2/app/sap/zfreightorder2/ info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Updated UIADs for UI5 Repository ZFREIGHTORDER2, package ZFREIGHT_ORDER_EVENT_PACKAGE, transport H02K900024 warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 App descriptor of type 'application' does not define a launchable inbound warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 No UIAD was created as no inbound is defined in manifest.json info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 For details see the application log (SLG1) in client 000 for object /UI5/APPIDX . info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 A BAdI implementation for /UI5/BADI_REPOSITORY_LOAD is active: Final activities may have been performed. warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 SAPUI5 application ZFREIGHTORDER2 was uploaded or registered with warnings info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Done * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 App available at https://ad7f109a-dfc3-490b-9539-669f3cbf0578.abap-web.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/zfreightorder2 info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Deployment Successful. node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:265 throw new ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND( ^ Error [ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND]: Cannot find module '/home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm/index.js' imported from /home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/rimraf/dist/esm/index.js at finalizeResolution (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:265:11) at moduleResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:933:10) at defaultResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:1157:11) at ModuleLoader.defaultResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:390:12) at ModuleLoader.resolve (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:359:25) at ModuleLoader.getModuleJob (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:234:38) at ModuleWrap. (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:87:39) at link (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:86:36) { code: 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND', url: 'file:///home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm/index.js' }

I checked the folder home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm, the index.js not exists, even I copied index.js from another project, the issue is the same .

Would you please let me know how to resolve this issue ?

 

Best regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Sustainability Control Tower latest
entry.content:
Per the latest update in sustainability control tower i see a tile named "CPE Process Templates for Data Management", I want to use this feature to upload "Injury" data. 

Used the "Actual New Records based on Data in DPI" process which has the 6 steps needed to upload data. 

However, in the "Import & Excel" section i see the upload button is greyed out as shown below. Has anyone faced this issue?

Is there any other way of uploading new data in SCT? I am aware of the "Manage Master Data" tile which is used to upload master data.

Whats the purpose for "Manage ESG Data" ?  I tried uploading a file for the measure  "INJ_INJURED_PERSON"

entry.title: Re: Can not deploy Fiori project to BTP ABAP environment .
entry.content: I changed the version of RIMRAF from 5.07 to 5.05 and the issue gone. So it is a issue of rimraf@5.07 . But another issue happens in BTP abap environment.

entry.title: Re: Explore cost-efficiently the latest SAP S/4HANA Build with Guided Beta SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02
entry.content:
Hi Necla,

This looks quite interesting, albeit I'm not sure how it actually would work in practice - I tried to look at the presentation but it appears to be not accessible (even using my S-ID):

Response is "It looks that you do not have access to the requested resource."

Thanks,

Matt

entry.title: Re: Delivery setup indicator for previous year PURCHASE O...
entry.content:
Dear Jerrysam,

I hope you are doing well.

It is indeed possible to mark the delivery complete indicator even if over delivery tolerance is maintained. If you are encountering issues in doing so, please let me know, and I will be happy to assist.

Additionally, please check message type M7433, which will trigger and prevent the creation of a Goods Receipt if it is marked as "E".

Thank you, and I am here to support you.

entry.title: Is it possible to create a form that allows participants to input content?
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a form that allows participants to input content?

We need to create a form that allows below order:

A: Initiate blank form > B: Fill in required fields > C: Approve.

However, C is not standard role therefore performance form is not applicable. The current MDF workflow in EC does not allow A to initiate blank form, and B has to click [Update] button in workflow page to input. There's no way for A to just initiate a blank form and for B to input without clicking [Update].

This post is to discuss if there's any possibility to allow A to initiate a blank form then B fill in required fields in SF product? Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
Thank you for reply. 

 

Then,

only changes in SE16N DEBUG are recorded,

and changes in SE11 DEBUG are not recorded....

entry.content:
Hi Henrike,

Thank you for answering this!

In this Q&A, I am asking the download file path (= the location where payment media is downloaded).

Which part of the document you shared mentions the download file path?

regards,

Tomoyoshi

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was cancelled"
entry.content:
Hi Rajmungarwadi,

The "CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB" error is a problem with the number range assignments or availability. Checking the relevant number range is a good first step in troubleshooting this issue.

It's advisable to check the number range for material documents.

Thankyou.

entry.title: Register Now – Q3 Onboarding User Group Meeting – Sept 18th
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please Register Here to receive the event invite and login details.

Q3 Onboarding User Group Meeting

Wednesday, September 18th – 11:00 am - 12:30 pm Eastern

REGISTER NOW!

Our Onboarding User Group is customer led by Flynn Group of Companies, JM Huber Corporation and Rogers Corporation. This meeting will provide you with an opportunity to connect with peer Onboarding customers, submit questions to chat with others about, hear from Onboarding experts and listen to a Customer Spotlight.

If you haven’t already, please subscribe to the Customer Empowerment Events Newsletter HERE!  It’s a great resource to stay up to date on all User Group sessions globally.  Also, please check out the User Group Calendar HERE!

Any questions about this meeting, please reach out to Lindsay Westra, Director, User Engagement, SAP SuccessFactors at lindsay.westra@sap.com.  Thank you!

You may check the isVerified, verifiedTimestamp, verified fields on the customer profile to see if the phone number is verified or not.

entry.title: Re: Steps to access Azure Blob Storage via REST API from SAP CPI using Azure Storage Adapter and SAP
entry.content:
Hello Dharam,

Can you please provide steps with snapshot on how to access Azure Blob using HTTP adapter? What method to use to post file in Blob? Currently, I am following the steps mentioned by you for HTTP adapter, but it errors out stating "405 

UnsupportedHttpVerb" while posting files.
 
Regards,
Amrita

entry.title: Re: BP - Vendor - have multiple addresses
entry.content:
Hi  Dear,

We had the same business requirement . Please find the solution 

To set up partner determination for delivery in SAP, follow these steps:

  1. Go to IMG (Implementation Guide) > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Partner Determination > Set up Partner Determination > Set Up Partner Determination for Delivery.
  2. Select El in partner determination procedure and click on partner function.
  3. Here, you can add a new partner function, such as Goods Supplier (GS), to allow different pick-up addresses in the inbound delivery/shipment.

Defining Account Groups for Vendors:

  1. Go to IMG > Financial Accounting > Accounts Receivables and Accounts Payable > Master Data > Define Account Groups with Screen Layout (Vendors).
  2. Create a new vendor account group specifically for Goods Suppliers, as only an address is required for these vendors.

Creating Number Ranges for Vendor Accounts:

  1. Go to IMG > Financial Accounting > Accounts Receivables and Accounts Payable > Master Data > Preparations for Creating Supplier Master Data > Create Number Ranges for Vendor Accounts & Assign Number Ranges to Vendor Account Groups.
  2. Create a new number range for the Goods Supplier account group and assign it to that group.

Defining Business Partner Roles:

  1. Go to IMG > Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner > Basic Settings > Business Partner Roles > Define BP Roles.
  2. Create a new role specific for Goods Suppliers, such as ZFLVN0 (by copying the standard FLVN01 role).

Defining Number Ranges for Business Partners:

  1. Go to IMG > Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner > Basic Settings > Number Ranges and Groupings > Define Number Range & Define Groupings and Assign Number Ranges.
  2. Define a new number range for the Goods Supplier business partner role (ZFLVN0) and assign it to that role.

Configuring Field Attributes per Business Partner Role:

  1. Go to IMG > Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner > Basic Settings > Field Groupings > Configure Field Attributes per BP Role > Configure Field Attributes for Each Role Category (0001-3500).
  2. Configure which fields are mandatory for the Goods Supplier role category. For example, set City and Country as mandatory fields for Goods Suppliers.

By following these steps, you can set up the necessary configurations in SAP to handle Goods Suppliers as a separate partner function, account group, and business partner role, with specific number ranges and field requirements.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Date Management to Configure Service Contract Dates
entry.content:
Hi @HarunSLK,

Thanks for your comments.

You can use the basic steps above and apply the following XML for the new date rule to make contract start date at first of next month:

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<SAPTimeRule>
 <TimeRuleTree>
  <!-- Begin of Rule Tree -->
     <ruleline>
     <!-- Begin of new LINE -->
      <AssignTimeExp displaytype="AssignTime">
        <!-- Assign time -->
          <VarTimeExp displayType="VarTime"
                             name="RESULT"
                          position="B">
           <!-- Variable: Time -->
          </VarTimeExp>
           <!-- Round result of move to 1st of month -->
          <RoundTimeExp displaytype="RoundTimeExp"
                         timeunit="MONTH"
                          position="E">
            <MoveTimeExp displaytype="MoveTime" direction="+">
             <!-- Move -->
                           <ConstLocTimeExp displaytype="ConstLocTime"
                        date="now"
                        time="000000"
                        timeunit="DAY">
              <VarObjectExp displaytype="VarObject" name="SYSTEM"/>
          </ConstLocTimeExp>
              <ConstDuraExp displaytype="ConstDura"
                            duration="1" timeunit="DAY">
              <!-- Constant Duration -->
                 <VarObjectExp displaytype="VarObject"
                               name="SYSTEM"/>
                 <!-- Variable: Timeobject -->
              </ConstDuraExp>
            </MoveTimeExp>
           </RoundTimeExp>
       </AssignTimeExp>
     </ruleline>
 </TimeRuleTree>
</SAPTimeRule>

For subscription items of solution orders, copy the date profile SUBS_DAT_PRO (Date profile for subscription billing) to add your new date rule.

Good luck!

Best regards,

Wei

entry.title: Compound documents are generating forever in Producer
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I tried to generate compound document for a group that contains 8 simulations. The generation process happens forever. I deleted and reuploaded the simulations but this is the case.

Thanks

entry.title: when posting key is 09、19、29 and 39,why field of "Due Date" is required entry
entry.content:
Hi dear all

when posting key is 09、19、29 and 39,why field of "Due Date" is required entry?
Eventhough the related configuration have been set to optional entry.

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: BP - Vendor - have multiple addresses
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for your update. I understand from the above solution, we need to create another Business Partner as Goods Supplier which is different from Supplier (Vendor) BP Number. If this is the case, business is not agree to this solution, we have proposed the same, but it was declined. They need to have one BP -Vendor with this they want to receive supplies from two different places (of their plants).

entry.title: Update User Status for operation
entry.content:
Hello MDK Experts,

For one of requirement, we want to get and update User Status for operation, which is Fetched from JEST Table.

To get data we need to activate it from OMDO field selection, but JEST Table is not listed in field selection details, could you please advise how we can achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Camera Access permission on Attachment Control
entry.content: One option would be to look at the @nativescript/camera module code.  They have a request permissions function that should give you guidance on how to check.  You may be able to simply include that plugin in a branded client and just use the permission functions they provide since it should be universal for the app.

entry.title: Re: Can I add some sections into my MDK Project
entry.content: I'm not entirely clear on what you are asking here. Can you please elaborate? Are you trying to create a launchpad like page in MDK?

entry.title: Re: Corporate applicants to the digital skills initiative: Tell us your story!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano , 

I graduated in accounting and auditing. I got job in SAP Financial consultancy, but in project my role is low level and very different i.e. of testing, as I did not have proven skill in SAP. If I get certified then I will get better roles and responsibilities. If you also think the same then pleases consider my application. I have already completed the digital skills initiative applicant and also completed a learning journey. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Print Template in SAP Dm not visible
entry.content:
Hi Sayuj,

Please change your formatter type from PDF to Adobe Forms PDF in Manage Document Print and test whether it is working or not.
If not, the please check with Standard Document Name that are already available in Manage Document Print Template


Do let me know, if you are still facing any issue.

BR,
Kartik Singhal

entry.title: Re: Camera Access permission on Attachment Control
entry.content: @bill_froelich when we use @nativescript/camera (added in BAS Bundler Externals ) getting below error

entry.title: Re: If Mobile Web is Dead, Why bother about web applications on mobile?
entry.content:
Mobile Web is dead? Think again!  With progressive web apps and mobile-optimized sites, web applications on mobile are more alive than ever. It’s not about the platform, it’s about the experience.

https://www.ixrlabs.com/engineering.php

entry.title: Re: Camera Access permission on Attachment Control
entry.content: You can't just add it in externals. You need to create a branded MDK client and include it in the MDKProject.json accordingly. That error indicates the client you are running does not have the plugin installed.

entry.title: Filter Section : Fixed Values vs Default values. #BW4HANA #BEX
entry.content:
Hi Everybody,

I'm trying to filter my query but I found two panels in BW4HANA.

What is the difference between Filter Fixed Values and Filter Default values? In the older version, we are aware of selecting the Default value. But not completely sure why we have two filter panels?? In which scenario do we go with them??

I tried to filter with values on my material in default and fixed panel and I found there is not difference.

Can someone please help me on it.

#BW4HANA  #BEX  #BW

Thank you.

Kind Regards,

V

entry.title: Re: Fixed issues documentation for CR 13SP36
entry.content: Thanks!

entry.title: Powering Progress: Leveraging SAP CX for Innovation and Growth in Utilities Commerce
entry.content:
Challenges in the utility industry

  • Increased competition, growing number of energy companies
  • Go green initiatives (Solar, EV) and enable customers to choose from a variety of options in energy consumption including self-generation.
  • Inability to understand customer behavior, lack of business / customer insights
  • Omnichannel approach to customer care, ranging from traditional to self-service, mobile, AI chatbots, and other digital channels. Engaging with customers on time for renewal of services and upgrading the energy plans.
  • Customer engagement on time about planned outages, service visits, tariff changes and efficient energy conservation.

Here are some suggestions that will help businesses to overcome the major challenges.

  • End to end digital transformation.
  • Customer engagement across all channels -self-service portals, personalized recommendations, proactive communication, and fostering loyalty and trust in each business transaction.
  • Simplified strong purchase process and service engagements.
  • Post-order services like communicating usage updates, service updates, billing and offers.
  • Streamlining the purchase and service processes

SAP CX for the utility industry will play a major role in solving the main challenges and improving sales / service revenue, profit, and customer engagement.

 

In this article, we will see how utility commerce will help customers to buy and consume relevant products and services, how they track services and billing cycles.

 

Persona: Mark Rivers - Utility Customer

Mark is building a new house, and he would like to get a quotation for his gas chambers and solar panels installation.

What Mark needs

  • Find products which are suitable for his home needs.
  • Find the related products which are also needed for the installation.
  • Get bundle of products which need to be bought together to complete install with offer price.
  • Finding the subscription plan that suits his consumption needs and billing cycle.
  • Get a quote for the plan, verify the applicable charges, including one-time charges, recurring charges, and usage-based charges and buy it.
  • Checking the service schedules and payment due dates via the portal/app the app. He can also view payment history, edit the billing cycle, payment methods, and access discounts/rewards.

SAP Commerce Cloud Utility accelerator is enabling the customer experience using the following features.

Product offering

 

Product Offering is a commercial representation sellable product/service to customer. It is created based on product specifications, their characteristics, and values; as well as defining all the applicable charges, including one-time charges, recurring charges, and usage-based charges.

A Product Offering is either Simple (representing a typical Product) or Bundled (bundling multiple Product Offerings together).

Bundles

A Bundled Product Offering (BPO) is a set of product offerings grouped together and sold as a bundled product offering.

Guided Selling and Customer Journey

Configurable Guided Selling (CGS) is the process in which a customer obtains a nested product bundle or complex product purchase.

Customer journey management simplifies the customer purchase journey, The journey is redefined to help customer with product offerings, relevant services, process flows which require specific actions to be taken (for example, address feasibility check is required), or additional information is to be entered by, and collected from the customer (for example, details help to decide installation) for an order to be successfully placed

Composite Pricing

A price could also encompass many different components. A typical introductory Product offering, for example, will have an installation cost, fixed a monthly cost and some sort of promotional component. Pricing supports a hierarchical and composite structure of prices, which references either Component or Composite Prices to be configured by Business Administrators.

 

Customer Inventory 

The Customer Product Inventory feature enables mapping between subscriptions and users, covering the customer and billing account. It holds the data around a customer, such as their subscriptions.

Serviceability Check 

Serviceability Check feature enables the business to upfront check if the selected product offering of a customer is valid or serviceable at the given location

Qualification Engine

Qualification Engine allows you to create and manage a variety of rules with respect to Product Offering commercial eligibility on customer purchases. You create rules by combining conditions and actions in a drag-and-drop user interface. These rules are new product catalog models used during the customer purchase journey.

Entitlement

Functionality around entitlements our product catalog model supports entitlements as part of each product specifications to show customer and help them in the buying process

Please refer the help documentation for details   https://help.sap.com/docs/TELCO_ACCELERATOR/32f0086927f44c9ab1199f1dab8833cd/72810f5a07b346faa9c5003c50ba8467.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/TELCO_ACCELERATOR/c762d9007c5c4f38bafbe4788446983e/cd9869bdd2314763bcf8681ab7ffe255.html

Persona: James Bell - Merchandiser / Category Manager

What James needs,

  • Enable customers to search and buy products quickly using site search, category navigation or guided selling which is configurable.
  • Create bundles and offers for various customer segments.
  • Create and fine tune cross sell / up sell strategy to increase order value.
  • Provide complete product information, price range and stock information which helps to complete the buying process.
  • Promote offers and discounts on plan.

Please refer above section for Merchandiser/Category Manager enablement

Persona: William Hunter - Sales/Service Executive

What William needs

  • Help customers to complete orders through quotes or single buying.
  • Quick and easy access to all relevant information such as customer data, product plans, services, bundles and offers.
  • Support customers with queries about orders or service

The following features enable the sales and service team to serve the customer quickly 

Customer Support Ticketing For efficient customer service during purchase and after purchase, you can use the Support Tickets feature from the Utilities Accelerator MY Account section, using which customers interact with customer support agents using support tickets to manage their plan, services and personal data
Assited Service ModuleThe Assisted Service Module (ASM) enables customer service personnel to provide real-time customer sales and service support
SAP Cloud for Customer 

Customers data, order, service billing is Synchronized 

Quotes can be managed by Sales rep internally in SAP Commerce cloud - Assisted service Module 

The integration replicates a commerce quote created by the customer in SAP Commerce Cloud to SAP Cloud for Customer, for further processing and actions.The sales representative can update and accept the quote in SAP Cloud for Customer. The updates in SAP Cloud for Customer gets replicated to SAP Commerce Cloud. The customer can then edit, accept, or reject the quote in the SAP Commerce Cloud storefront.

Assited Service Module Integration

An agent can click a link in the SAP Cloud for Customer system that quickly and seamlessly, using single sign-on, opens the Assisted Service Module on top of the SAP Commerce Cloud storefront to allow the agent to provide seamless omni-commerce interactive sales and service support to the customer in real-time, or off-line.

Sales agents using the SAP Commerce Cloud storefront can search and browse the online catalog to look up product information, configure product bundles, add products to carts, create quotes, or even check carts out for customers on their behalf. They can also help a customer with their account information, such as their payment details, existing orders, delivery address and so on. This enables your sales force and service team to provide interactive selling and service to your customers on the spot, improves the customer relationship, and makes the service and sales process more efficient.

Please refer the following help documentation for more details 

https://help.sap.com/docs/TELCO_ACCELERATOR/c762d9007c5c4f38bafbe4788446983e/cd9869bdd2314763bcf8681ab7ffe255.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_INTEGRATIONS/908ee62fb58e4ec99cea045413ff7225/8c47c75c86691014895c8d27d75f4787.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/e1391e5265574bfbb56ca4c0573ba1dc/8b571515866910148fc18b9e59d3e084.html

Conclusion

This article was developed to showcase how SAP Commerce Cloud enables transformative impact of e-commerce on the utility industry, emphasizing the benefits of enhanced customer experiences, operational efficiencies, and the adoption of innovative and sustainable practices.

entry.title: How to generate multiple output items for production orders with different form templates
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, how to generate multiple output items for production orders with the same data source and different form templates.

When the output items are viewed in the production order, or when an order is released and saved, Output Parameter Determination runs to determine the relevant output items and parameters in the background by applying business rules in decision tables.

SAP delivers default output settings to print a pick list and data list. We can change this with app Output Parameter Determination.

In Step Receiver, both lists are assigned to only one role “  “ (space) by default. If more than one form should be printed for a list, we can define more receiver entries with different roles to generate multiple outputs items following below steps.

Take output type : ORDER_DATA_LIST as example.

  1. Create a new form template YY1_ORDER_DATA_LIST based on standard form template : PP_MOR_DATA_LIST in app Maintain Form Template.
  2. Assign the form template in SSCUI-102313 (Assign Form Templates)

     

  3. Go to app ‘Output Parameter Determination’ , choose Business Rule : ‘Manufacturing Order (Production Planning)’ and Determination Step : ‘Receiver’.
    Create different Roles for Output Type : ORDER_DATA_LIST then activate it.

     

  4. Go to Determination Step : ‘Form Template’, maintain different form templates per Roles then activate it.
    Since column ‘Role’ is hidden by default , this needs to be enabled in the table settings.


      Tick on ‘Role’, then tick off ‘Channel’ which is already visible,  then hit OK to show the column ‘Role’ in the Decision Table.

     

  5.  Add a new entry for ORDER_DATA_LIST, maintain the Role and Form Template accordingly then activate the change. 

     

  6. Now, if creating production order, 2 output items will be generated automatically with different form templates.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Lynn. I identify as a person in the below categories:

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
  • Woman

I currently live in Vietnam and am fluent in Japanese, English, and Vietnamese, plus French at a business level. My professional background includes roles as a Coordinator, Project Manager, Account Manager, and currently as a Business Developer for an ITO company. 

With my experience, current connections and abilities, I want to switch to a SAP consultant career to assist customers with SAP implementations across various countries.

Thank you for your consideration.
Lynn Le

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Intelligent Screening with SAP Watch List Screening
entry.content:
You may recall that I introduced a pure SaaS solution in a GRC Tuesdays blog last year: SAP Watch List Screening. If you don’t remember, then I urge you to read the post so that you don’t miss out during your next dinner party when everyone will be talking about it.

And since I am magnanimous, you don’t need to search for the blog yourself, you can simply click on the following link: GRC Tuesdays: Hidden Gems – SAP Watch List Screening for Simplified Due Diligence and Compliance

Why bring this topic once again you may ask?

Well, because I feel this solution answers a more and more pressing need.

With over $1,5bn penalties imposed by the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) in 2023 alone, regulatory pressure – and the financial pain that comes with non-compliance, is real and companies are looking at how technology can help them automate screening without introducing more complexity to the processes.

I think SAP Watch List Screening provides a great answer to that. And yes: it does use Artificial Intelligence to achieve this feat!

Oxford dictionary defines Artificial Intelligence as “the theory and development of computer systems able to perform tasks normally requiring human intelligence, such as visual perception, speech recognition, decision-making, and translation between languages.”

And this is precisely what SAP Watch List Screening does: automate decision making so that trade compliance specialists in charge of screening are provided with all the data they need to perform their tasks. But it goes a step further: it also removes unnecessary burden from the user’s inbox. In that sense, it doesn’t add workload, it really acts in the background and only raises exceptions to be investigated when needed. All the others are closed automatically.

In essence, Screening specialists need to ensure that no transaction with parties on sanction lists can go ahead, but they also need to do this efficiently as any delay on their side can delay the entire sales process. Making a lot of people unhappy!

 

A simple 4-ingredient recipe

 

To achieve their goals, I think they only need 4 ingredients:

  • An automated software that consolidates information about screened data, list provider, percentage match, source, etc. in a single source – this is the value proposition brought by SAP Watch List Screening
  • Up-to-date denied party lists – this is provided by our content provider Mendel Verlag (separate contract required) automatically updated within the SAP screening service
  • Audit capability with the findings (hits) identified during the screening process – well, this one is really for the auditors in case there are questions and is of course a core capability
  • … and a secret ingredient: reduction of false positives – this is where the magic happens!

Too many screening hits – especially false positives, means that the Screening specialist will be spending too much time on avoidable investigations. Wasting valuable time and energy. And here’s where the intelligent screening comes in.

 

Intelligent screening

 

The intelligent screening capability within SAP Watch List Screening is a feature allowing the business user to avoid investigating again and again if the very same attributes are matched against the same entity several times. Instead, intelligent screening automatically decides on a “hit” when the screened name and the screened address are identical to records already investigated – matching decisions in the graph above, and completed. For this decision-making, the intelligent screening is fed by manual decisions made by Screening specialists on new hits that then serve as the basis for future automated decisions on hits with identical pairings.

All manual investigations therefore automatically improve the virtuous circle and help reduce – even prevent! – future manual efforts since the intelligent screening can automatically confirm or automatically reject hits that are similar to previous ones.

Illustration of a hit automatically rejected by intelligent screening so it won’t burden the investigator’s inbox

No more avoidable investigations by Screening specialists! These experts can now spend more time investigating real cases where their valuable insight can make a true difference.

What about you, how does your company automate the screening of sanction parties today? I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I would like to express my gratitude and interest in joining and participating in the Digital Skills Initiative by SAP.

A big thank you to you and your team in SAP for organizing this great program.

Below are the modules that I have explored recently, which align with my experience and my interest to deep dive into this learning journey as a beginner and to kickstart a new career:

  • 1. SAP BTP
  • 2. SAP S/4HANA EWM ABAP
  • 3. SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • 4. SAP Build

I am participating in this program for the following reasons:

  • 1. Career Shift/Job Switch
  • 2. New Midlife Career
  • 3. Career Advancement
  • 4. Life Changing
  • 5. Single Parent

I would appreciate it if I could join this great program. Thank you.

Warm regards,
Kurnia Kadir

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for international trade vs SAP Global Trade Services
entry.content:
Hi Trond

Thanks for all your great blogs.

A Customer wishes to record HS-Codes on their products to display on Sales Documents Outputs. Have added the cross-functional "add-on" of International trade by adding the correct roles as detailed in the SAP docco for International Trade.

Have played around and tried setting up apps: - Classify Products - Commodity codes, Classify Products - - Legal control, Classify Products - Customs Tariff Numbers and even "Manage Commodity codes" (in case) but am still unsure where "HS-Code" would be maintained.

In ECC this is in the PRODCOM field in the Material Master. Have read various blogs and sap notes and know its not maintained via product apps, but struggling to find out where or how.

Anyway, you could please give me a few pointers to set up HS-Codes please.

Many thanks

Derrick

entry.title: Re: Managing Overtime Pre-approval in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Great work @VivekPalanivel !

entry.title: Re: JSON model loading after the view is rendered, thus l...
entry.content:
Hi Amol,

Could you share a bit of code with us to see how you try to achieve this? 

I assume you are loading the json file with the loadData function. This returns a promise (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel%23methods/loadData)

What you can do depends on your application. If you are using a router, you could implement an async await in your onObjectMatched function. This async awaits waits till the loadData is done and with the result (the json file) you could set it back to your jsonmodel with setData as junwu also suggests.

For the sake of simplicity I did not write error handling.

 
public async _onRouteMatched() {
    const oModel = this.getView().getModel("myjsonmodel");
    const mydata = await this.loadMyJSONData(oModel);
    oModel.setData(mydata);
}

public async loadMyJSONData(oModel) {
    const oResponse = await oModel.loadData("https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1");
    return oResponse.json();
}

Kind regards,

Noël

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in Form Content

entry.title: Re: Can not deploy Fiori project to BTP ABAP environment .
entry.content: Probably not an issue with RIMRAF but with caching old files in your node_modules / dist folder. Sometimes when I am pretty sure it should work and it doesn't I delete both folders and run a npm install.

entry.title: SAP PM , Maintenance Order iw32- External service
entry.content:
I Have created a maintenance order, and the Control key i have used for operation is PM03, for external services, so i want to know how can i make the GROSS PRICE , displayed in external services tab to be Mandatory field.

i have tried doing it at /nspro >Material mangement>External services mngt> Define screen layout>iw32>prices and cost> Gross price > tick mandatory field.

but i doubt its the correct procedure as it may trigger mandatory for all control key.

entry.title: Re: Inspection for customer returns in public
entry.content: Hi @Suresh_Eswaran Right now, in S/4HANA cloud public edition, there is No direct integration between customer returns (scope item BKP) and quality management (inspection lot) for material inspection in returns. if you want such integration, please raise the request in customer influence portal. Best Regards, Bin

entry.title: Mapping your journey to SAP S/4HANA : A practical guide for senior IT leadership
entry.content:
One of the best informative advisory document that i have came across, definitely a must read by all the leaders who are planning for starting/completing their S/4HANA Transformation Journey.

"Mapping your journey to SAP S/4HANA : A practical guide for senior IT leadership"

https://www.sap.com/documents/2019/05/44b3ebd5-4b7d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.html

My Personal key takeaways from this guide which hopefully can help many of you  -

✅Making strategic choices with respect to deployment path to S/4HANA - Customers with the SAP ERP application havethe choice among system conversion ~ Brownfield Conversion, new implementation ~ Greenfield Conversion, and selective data transition. (Many of them do call this as Blue Field Conversion/Hybrid approach)

 

✅Cloud adoptions is key decisions when planning your digital transformation toward  SAP S/4HANA Cloud product you would like to implement – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

✅Following the clean core principle : Organization must adapt to a changing business environment and adopt new capabilities to thrive in a digital era.

https://www.sap.com/products/erp/rise/migration/clean-core.html 

✅Understanding the importance of compatibility packs in Note 2269324 and in this blog post- https://lnkd.in/gRpu7Qzs

✅Integration is a key enabler for digital business transformation and a future-proof enterprise solution estate. By using advanced technologies and services provided bySAP BTP, SAP helps ensure the integration of industry-specific business processes across SAP, partner, and third-party applications.

✅Key role played by SAP BTP – enabling, facilitating,& protecting the built-in suite qualities.

The capabilities in SAP BTP are grouped into five portfolios -

1️⃣Application development and automation- Low code No code

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/application-development.html 

2️⃣Artificial intelligence- Leverage SAP AI Services and support

https://www.sap.com/products/artificial-intelligence.html 

3️⃣Data and analytics- Leveraging HANA cloud, SAP Analytics cloud and SAP Datasphere

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/analytics.html 

4️⃣Extended planning and analysis - https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/extended-planning-analysis.html 

5️⃣SAP Integration Suite - https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/integration-suite.html 

 

✅The custom-code workstream should have these three major work packages:

1️⃣Removal of unused code

2️⃣Automated and manual code adaptation

3️⃣Review of modifications, clones, and implicit enhancements

 

✅Plan for proper risk free Rollout Strategy

 

✅Understanding system downtime and different optimization techniques like leveraging DMOVE2S4 via Downtime Optimized Conversion ~ doC or downtime optimized DMO ~ doDMO which can help to convert & migrate via One step approach in minimum downtime.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SLTOOLSET/7d57e56e12104cc68bce7646cd9f4cbf/c17f45ffa4004ca4837913a745b3a081.html 

✅Importance of Data Cleansing, Archiving , Sizing & Data Volume Management does play a major role along with Custom Code Analysis & Adjustment to reduce the overall data footprint prior to Migration .

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/2280273f45054d318142b271b06a03c1/e445e854d52d47a8b1ee32e9a064d438.html 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2818267/E - Data Volume Management during migration to SAP S/4HANA

✅Start Discovery phase pretty early and Work on Essential tools like -

1️⃣SAP Readiness Check - SAP Readiness Check provides a suite of tools to assist in the planning of the next step on your digital transformation journey.

Landing page https://me.sap.com/readinesscheck

KBA note - https://me.sap.com/notes/3404904

2️⃣Custom Code Migration app - https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/custom-code-migration 

3️⃣SAP Business Transformation Center (especially if Selective Data Transition is being used for Migration) - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-business-transformation-center-digital-blueprint/ba-p/13570978

KBA note# https://me.sap.com/notes/3328319 and Landing page- https://support.sap.com/content/dam/support/en_us/library/ssp/alm/sap-cloud-alm/transformation/SAP_BTC_Quickstart.pdf 

4️⃣Usage of Maintenance Planner - https://support.sap.com/en/alm/solution-manager/processes-72/maintenance-planner.html 

5️⃣SAP Signavio for Business Process insights - https://www.signavio.com/products/process-insights/ 

6️⃣SAP Integration Suite , Integration Advisor & Downtime tools

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/integration-suite.html 

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/sap-integration-advisor 

https://support.sap.com/en/tools/software-logistics-tools/software-update-manager.html?anchorId=section 

 

7️⃣S/4HANA Migration and CVI Cockpit, DTV Validation tool

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3147029 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2951811 

Thank you for reading it and I hope above provided links in this blog may be useful for you in your S/4HANA Transformation Journey, best wishes !!

entry.title: Re: How to embedd a mashup (HTML , no port binding) with...
entry.content:
Hi Feli,

The scroll bar is not controlled by Mashup. Mashup is only for displaying the content. If the content has no scroll bar, then Mashup will not display it. You can try to hardcode the size or contact the developers of the SAC report.

Regards,
Alan

entry.title: Re: How to register Bank Account ID
entry.content:
Hi Miiwa,

Currently we have BankAccount in substructure DebtorItem-OneTimeCustomerDetails, while Bank Account ID is not supported. If you need this field, please create a request via Customer Influence.

Best Regards,

Alice

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content:
Hi Noel,

 <core:Title id='inputSection1' text="Eingabefelder" />
                    <Label id='confLabel' text="{i18n>confirmationNumber}" />
                    <Input id="confInput"/>
                     <ndc:BarcodeScannerButton
                                id="confScan"
                                scanSuccess="onScanSuccess"
                                scanFail="onScanError"
                                inputLiveUpdate="onScanLiveupdate"
                                dialogTitle="{i18n>confirmationNumber}"
                            />
 
The error then in the console is:
Error: Element sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton#container-zppleanmes---MainView--confScan is not a valid Form content! Only use valid content in Element sap.ui.layout.form.ColumnLayout#container-zppleanmes---MainView--SimpleFormChangeColumn_twoGroups234--Layout
 
If I place it out of the Simple Form, I am able to see and use it as expected.

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content:
Activate the ICM trace in transaction SICM. It will show you, why the backend replies with 403.

Also helpful might be to activate the Payload Trace in the SCC. Then you can take a look at the HTTP Body of the 403 response, which might give further error details.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Rama, 

We have recorded your request. We will inform you if there are any cancellation or if any seat gets freed up. 

Best Regards, Ajay

entry.title: Re: Flow Function got instance error
entry.content: NOTE: This issue not every time i encountered.  it fix after i close/open the flow 2-3 times.

entry.title: Re: Production version with validity date in future
entry.content:
I guess a PDS is used as a source of supply in your SCM system.
If the PDS gets transferred then just the current date range is selected.
If you display the PDS via /SAPAPO/CURTO_SIMU then you will see just one PDS.

In order to transfer which start in the future the selection data needs to be set to a future date.

This is done in BAdI method CHANGE_EFFECTIVITY_DATE of BAdI CUSLNTRTO_ADDIN see note 1464564.

My client used the "Copy Inspection Results" option in their S4Hana On-premises system even after the UD had been made.

They now request the same features on the public cloud. So, in the public cloud, is it possible to copy inspection results from one inspection lot to another after the usage decision has been made?

 

thanks / Suresh.E

entry.title: Flexible column layout in SAP MDK as Navigation and Display Page
entry.content:
Hi,

I'd like to know, if it's possible to somehow use the flexible column layout in the following way, since the app would only be used on tablets:

The left (start) page should be sort of a navigation page to jump to certain elements (divisions) on the right side. Here's a picture of how I would like it to be in the emulator:

I tried doing that with the cross navigation action and each button navigating to a different page, but the page on the right side should be one long form and not many single pages for each division.

 

I also couldn't find anything about the use of jumpTo() to e.g. scroll back to the top of a page? I guess it failed cause I can't scroll to an object, but how else would I do it? Here's my failed attempt:

export default function jumpToFC(clientAPI) {
    let scrollDestination = clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('SectionFormCell0');
    scrollDestination.scrollTo(0,0);   
}

 Thanks in advance for any kind of help 🙂

 

Greetings

Markus

entry.title: What's new in SAP Mobile Services - OData CSDL Modeler 1.1.4
entry.content:
In this blog post, we will show you the UX update in SAP Mobile Services - OData CSDL Modeler 1.1.4. SAP Mobile Services OData CSDL Modeler is an extension of Microsoft Visual Studio Code and SAP Business Application Studio which allows the mobile developers and business consultants to view the OData CSDL and EDMX model in a graphical manner.

First intall the latest OData CSDL Modeler from https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=SAPSE.vsc-extension-odata-csdl-modeler. After the installation, copy the OData CSDL file to your VSCODE workspace:

Right click the CSDL file and choose "Open With..." option:

In the context menu, choose "OData CSDL Modeler" menu item to open SAP Mobile Services OData CSDL Modeler:

After the OData CSDL Modeler shows up, you will first see a structured view for the CSDL model in the editor:

Under this view, you are able to see the entity types in the master view, and properties in the detail view for this CSDL model.

If you want to switch to a graphical view, choose the "Diagram" option in the toolbar:

You can move the diagram to view different parts of the model as well as zoom in/out in the canvas:

And if you want to view the metadata XML for the CSDL model, choose the "Metadata" view:

And finally, you can use the OData CSDL Modeler together with SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools so that the SAP backend OData services can be visualized in the mobile destinations from SAP Mobile Services:

In this blog post, we showed you the major UX update for SAP Mobile Services OData CSDL Modeler, as well as how to visualize the backend OData services of SAP Mobile Services using the combination of the OData CSDL Modeler and SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools.

entry.title: Re: Progression: Program type Progression
entry.content:
Hi Mehboob,

Check if any Program Plan setting is made for UG program(SC level) to consider preparatory program. When you are seeing Program type see radio button is for One program or All programs.

Hope you got the solution by now. If yes, share your feedback.

Rahman

entry.title: Re: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
Hi,

Raymond is right, SE16N_CD_KEY is the table for all changes done in the edit mode of SE16N (by activating gd-edit/sapedit in debug, with &SAP_EDIT, calling FM SE16N_INTERFACE with edit flag or by using t-code SE16N_EMERGENCY). You can see the entries in SE16N in this menu

I tested earlier and (unfortunately) this does not apply if you edit the table in the old SE16, you don't get the change documents saved in SE16N_CD_KEY.

Regarding changes done in debug, not sure if it's a special setting, but I can see in SM21 log if someone changed a value or jumped to other lines. For example 

The first 2 lines are about me changing the value of the CODE variable from SHOW to EDIT, the next 2 about jumping from line 33 to 46 and the last ones about changing value of SY-UCOMM to INSR, all done in code below for testing.

Manu

entry.title: Re: Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types - Public Cloud

entry.content:
We are facing this issue in all company code after S4 PERSON_NAME migration.

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Legacy data transfer date XXXXXX is in a closed fisca...
entry.content:
For example company code xxxx

 

faa_cmp

cc 1000

Seq.No. TransfrDat      Legacy Transfer Status

     1  01.04.2022 Ongoing (Other Postings Allowed    !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! this is not correct. You are still in status Ongoing and then you are trying to do another legacy segment.

go to FAA_CMP

 

Set status complete for the  legacy segment

SAVE

Go to FAA_CMP

Create a new legacy date segment

entry.title: Total Cost Commitment in CN41N report
entry.content: Total cost commitment column in Report CN41N is blank after creating the purchase order from purchase requisition. The amount is displayed in Plan cost but "Total Cost Commitment" column is still blank. How can I configure the purchase order amount as "Commitment" in MM or Project System.

entry.title: Re: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content: @ricky_shawJust click the links? Or ask GPT.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data and Analytics Forum 12.-13.11.2024
entry.content:
Hi Sven,

yes it is in German only. 

BR

Johann

entry.title: Re: Copying Inspection Results After a Usage Decision
entry.content:
Hello!

The ability to copy inspection results after a usage decision in SAP S/4HANA Cloud may differ from the on-premises version. It’s best to consult the SAP S/4HANA Cloud documentation.

 

 

Best Regards,

Panorama Charter

entry.title: Re: Depreciation below zero
entry.content: Hi Mark, thanks for your reply. For cost accounting purposes we would like to see the imputed depreciation after end of useful life of assets. This would only be in a non-posting depreciation area.

entry.title: Re: Screenshot not working (Android)
entry.content: I'm not familiar with Android ... I'm an iPhone guy. Maybe describe a little more what you want to do and the SAP Build people / the community can suggest something.

entry.title: Re: How to enable PDF Preview in smart form print preview
entry.content: My 2 cents. Maybe you are not using the normal way to preview i.e. pass CONTROL_PARAMETERS-PREVIEW = 'X' when generating the Smart Form.

entry.title: Hello Team, How to Auto populate data in mandatory fields in Service Now Incident via SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: I have integrated SNOW incident and SAP Cloud ALM. Now the incident is created but some of the mandatory fields are not auto populating the data. To customize the fields in mapping rule, I do not get the related documents. The mandatory fields are "Service", "Category" and "Channel". Does anyone have any idea how to proceed further ???

entry.title: Calling a BAPI inside a BADI
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

Recently I came across a query on :-

What are advantages and disadvantages of calling a BAPI inside a BADI ?

What are the  pitfalls that we enconunter when we call a BAPI inside a BADI ?

Can anyone here throw some light on the above said query. Thanks.

K.Kiran

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Transportation Management (WDTMB)

entry.title: Apache spark dataframe jdbc write- how to use table_type= COLUMN during writing dataframe using jdbc
entry.content:
I have a apache spark dataframe, it has multiple columns with datatype of string, decimal, integer, boolean.

I want to write this dataframe to sap hana using spark j dbcDF.write.format("jdbc") . 

Problem: Spark dataframe is column type. BY default sap hana creates a table of row type. I want to be create a column type of table using jdbc options. But I could not find the solutions.

my code:

df.write.format("jdbc").option("driver", "com.sap.db.jdbc.Driver").option(
    "url", "jdbc:sap://10.10.xxx.xxx:30015/"
).option("dbtable", "SAP.example_table").option("user", "*****").option(
    "password", "********"
).mode(
    "overwrite"
).save()

Here I have used ngdbc jar (com.sap.db.jdbc.Driver)

I need to understand how can I create table with  table_type= COLUMN.

If I use the above code it will throw error saying 

com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [264] (at 117): invalid datatype: TEXT type is not supported for row table: line 1 col 118 (at pos 117)

entry.title: Post scrap Qty equals to created production ord Qty in case of production failure at operation level
entry.content:
Hi PP Guru's,

Facing the below Error,
We have a scenario for our client in which due to production failure in operation level total production order quantity is supposed to be marked as Scrap while goods confirmation.(I'm unable to post and test this case)

Example: Production order quantity : 10 Qty

While goods confirmation in CO11N,

System proposed yeild to be confired 10 Qty.(we need yeild=0 Qty and scrap=10 Qty.)


Tried posting Goods movement for the header material: 0.00 Qty 


can anyone give me a practical example of how I should pass the values in Yeild and Scrap while goods confirmations.

Requesting@Raja_S_Reddy_B @former_member184574 to assist me.

Kindly update with your comments/feedback/inputs/advices, to make use of it as the Best, Quick & Easy Ref.

Regards,
Rajesh varma

entry.title: Re: Eclipse: How to see / change function module document...
entry.content: Thanks vulturas, I hoped that Eclipse might offer an embedded solution, not the old SAPGUI transaction 😉

entry.title: Re: ndc: BarcodeScannerButton not allowed to be placed in...
entry.content:
I also have a SimpleForm with a Label, Inputfield and custom control. It does not complain about it is not allowed. How did you specify your SimpleForm?

    <Label id='confLabel' text="{i18n>confirmationNumber}" />
    <Input id="confInput">
        <layoutData>
            <l:GridData span="L5 M5 S5" />
        </layoutData>
    </Input>
    <ndc:BarcodeScannerButton id="confScan"
        scanSuccess="onScanSuccess"
        scanFail="onScanError"
        inputLiveUpdate="onScanLiveupdate"
        dialogTitle="{i18n>confirmationNumber}">
        <layoutData>
            <l:GridData span="L1 M1 S1" />
        </layoutData>
    <ndc:BarcodeScannerButton>
